name: Supreme Rice Krispie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter, Karo syrup, and sugar in a large pan on the stove over low heat.
2. Heat until the mixture is dissolved; turn off the stove and add 7 cups of Rice Krispies cereal.
3. Mix well. Press into a buttered 9-inch square baking pan.
4. Combine the butterscotch chips and chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl; heat until well melted.
5. Spread evenly over bars. Cool. Cut into squares.
Servings: about 16.
